_comment: Mirror of https://www.kaicalls.com/.well-known/agent-skills/index.json — the product connectors KaiCalls publishes. The live endpoint adds a computed sha256 per entry. These are customer-facing connectors, NOT internal tooling.

skills.name: kaicalls-mcp
skills.description: Connect to KaiCalls via MCP to make calls, check statuses, and retrieve transcripts.

skills.name: kaicalls-api
skills.description: KaiCalls REST API for managing AI phone agents, calls, leads, and campaigns.

skills.name: kaicalls-agent-discovery
skills.description: Agent-to-Agent discovery card for KaiCalls AI phone agents.

skills.name: kaicalls-agent-signup
skills.description: Programmatic API-first onboarding and MCP server connector setup for agents.
